request: Use verified RAG knowledge and prior DinoBrain conversation knowledge to critically audit DinoBrain and find consensus improvements toward the user's desired OS: mandatory pre-response OS loop, high-quality RAG/LLM Wiki, provenance, behavior gates, feedback writeback, observability, new-PC recovery, and automatic knowledge compounding. Use 10 subagents and iterate until consensus improvements are found.

gates.reason: Every started OS task must be closed with finish_task.
gates.safe_action: Keep the task visible as active/pending until finish_task writes a trace.
